2605.17997.title: MARR: Module-Adaptive Residual Reconstruction for Low-Bit Post-Training Quantization
2605.17997.paper_summary: Recently, residual reconstruction-based model quantization methods have achieved promising performance in low-bit post-training quantization (PTQ) by introducing cross-layer residuals to reduce error accumulated from previous layers.However, these residuals may also introduce additional bias arising from the Hessian-approximation (HA) assumption underlying reconstruction-based PTQ, leading to suboptimal quantization performance.In this work, we analyze that multiplying the residual term by a scaling coefficient provides a direct way to mitigate the HA bias associated with residual strength, while preserving accumulated-error correction. More importantly, we observe that this trade-off is module-dependent, making a single global residual strength insufficient to balance effective correction and residual-related bias across modules.Based on these observations, we propose Module-Adaptive Residual Reconstruction (MARR), which assigns a module-specific scaling coefficient to adaptively balance accumulated-error correction and residual-related HA bias for each module.To avoid expensive per-module coefficient search and obtain a stable coefficient estimate, we design a Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID)-based adaptive update strategy that uses reconstruction error as feedback to progressively refine this coefficient. Experiments on several typical large language models (LLMs) and vision transformers (ViTs) demonstrate the effectiveness of MARR under low-bit quantization (less than or equal to 4-bit), achieving up to 20.2% performance gains on LLMs and up to 4.6% relative gains on ViTs over the residual reconstruction state-of-the-art methods.Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
2605.17997.paper_summary_zh: 最近，基於殘差重建的模型量化方法在低位後訓練量化（PTQ）中取得了令人鼓舞的表現，通過引入跨層殘差來減少來自前面層的誤差累積。然而，這些殘差也可能引入來自重建基於PTQ的海森近似（HA）假設的額外偏差，導致次優的量化性能。在這項工作中，我們分析了將殘差項乘以縮放係數提供了一種直接的方法來減輕與殘差強度相關的HA偏差，同時保留累積誤差的修正。更重要的是，我們觀察到這種權衡是模組依賴的，使得單一的全局殘差強度不足以平衡各模組之間的有效修正和與殘差相關的偏差。基於這些觀察，我們提出了模組自適應殘差重建（MARR），為每個模組分配一個特定的縮放係數，以自適應地平衡累積誤差修正和與殘差相關的HA偏差。為了避免昂貴的每模組係數搜索並獲得穩定的係數估計，我們設計了一種基於比例-積分-微分（PID）的自適應更新策略，利用重建誤差作為反饋，逐步細化這個係數。在幾個典型的大型語言模型（LLMs）和視覺Transformer（ViTs）上的實驗證明了MARR在低位量化（小於或等於4位）下的有效性，LLMs的性能提升達到20.2%，而ViTs的相對增益則達到4.6%，超過了殘差重建的最先進方法。代碼將在接受後公開。
2605.17997.author: Le Su et.al.
2605.17997.authors: Le Su, Xing Luo, Zhi Jin
